title: Device Home Screen - Zoom out the application to verify that it remains the same
scenario: App switcher preview and return-to-full-screen behavior remains correct on Home screen and Device Settings screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a connected Bluetooth audio device.
2. Verify the app is on the Home screen.
3. Open the app switcher (multitasking view) and observe the preview of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Tap the Poly Studio Mobile app preview to return to full screen.
5. Confirm the app remains on the Home screen and the UI is unchanged.
6. On the Home screen, tap the "..." (More) button next to the connected device.
7. Verify the Device Settings screen is displayed.
8. Open the app switcher again and observe the preview of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Tap the Poly Studio Mobile app preview to return to full screen.
10. Confirm the app remains on the Device Settings screen and the UI is unchanged.
expected: The app preview in the app switcher correctly shows the current screen (Home or Device Settings). After returning to full screen, the app remains on the same screen with no UI glitches, layout shifts, or unintended navigation.
